misc.title: If you look closely the leader is removing something from the guy on the altar chest . THE SAME ppl enel revived, in the latest one piece chapter we see that the holy night's has metal hearts , which
misc.text: If you look closely the leader is removing something from the guy on the altar chest . THE SAME ppl enel revived, in the latest one piece chapter we see that the holy night's has metal hearts , which could theoretically belong to these guys maybe a Maria situation #onepiece
